name: code4me-marketplace
description: Marketplace for code4me — a multi-agent SDLC orchestrator for Claude Code (and its sibling audit4me).

plugins.name: code4me
plugins.description: Multi-agent SDLC orchestrator: classifies workflow weight (Trivial/Conversation/Light/Standard/Critical), dispatches specialist subagents, enforces quality gates + auto-escalation, with opt-in cross-vendor pairing (Anthropic + OpenAI + DeepSeek), runtime PreToolUse hooks, structural-index-first consultation, and the audit4me codebase auditor.
